overall.description: A first-person perspective walkthrough in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning at a rooftop observation deck overlooking Night City, then proceeding along a coastal highway lined with palm trees and futuristic vehicles, with moments overlooking the ocean and distant city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop observation deck with coin-operated binocular viewer

events.description: camera pans left away from the binocular viewer to reveal more of the rooftop edge

agents.ego_description: standing at the rooftop edge looking out at the Night City skyline, then moving left along the rooftop

entered.detail: coin-operated binocular viewer with NC label overlooking the city
futuristic cityscape with illuminated skyscrapers against night sky
low concrete wall marking the edge of the rooftop

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rooftop observation deck at night, with a coin-operated binocular viewer in the foreground and the illuminated Night City skyline visible in the distance. The camera pans left along the rooftop edge, revealing the expansive city view.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop shelter with green neon lighting and scattered debris

exiting the shelter area and approaching the road level

entered.detail: metal and concrete shelter with green neon interior lighting
tall palm tree growing near the shelter structure
cyberpunk-style green neon illumination inside the shelter
trash and discarded items littering the rooftop surface

segments.scene_description: Moving along the rooftop, the camera approaches a shelter structure bathed in green neon light. A palm tree stands nearby, and debris is scattered across the concrete surface. The scene transitions from the open rooftop to this semi-covered area before approaching the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway sidewalk with palm trees and passing traffic

events.description: descending from rooftop to street level and beginning to walk along the coastal highway
futuristic vehicle passes by on the coastal highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the coastal sidewalk next to the highway, passing palm trees

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car driving along the coastal highway with headlights on

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt road with lane markings running parallel to the coast
modern street lamp illuminating the sidewalk with warm light
paved pedestrian walkway separated from the road by a curb

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to street level as the camera walks along a coastal highway sidewalk. Palm trees line the path, and futuristic vehicles pass by on the road to the left. Street lamps provide warm illumination against the cool night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal overlook with view of ocean and distant city lights

events.description: camera turns right to look over the barrier wall at the ocean and distant city

agents.ego_description: pausing to look out over the ocean at the distant city lights while continuing to walk

entered.detail: low concrete wall separating the sidewalk from the coastal drop-off
dark ocean water reflecting distant lights on the surface
twinkling lights from buildings across the water or along the distant coast

segments.scene_description: While walking along the coastal path, the camera turns to overlook the ocean, revealing a concrete barrier wall and the dark water below. Distant city lights twinkle across the water, creating a serene nighttime vista.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway with moderate traffic and guard rails

events.description: camera turns back to face forward along the highway
multiple futuristic vehicles pass by on the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the coastal highway as multiple vehicles pass by on the left

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car overtaking another vehicle on the highway

entered.detail: metal guard rail running along the edge of the coastal highway
series of street lamps lining the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to facing forward along the coastal highway, walking on the asphalt shoulder. Several futuristic vehicles pass by on the left, their headlights and taillights illuminating the road. Street lights line the highway as it curves into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high-altitude rooftop observation deck down to a bustling coastal highway under a night sky. It begins by panning across the illuminated Night City skyline from behind a coin-operated binocular viewer before gliding toward a neon-green shelter and a solitary palm tree on the concrete roof. The perspective then descends to street level, transitioning onto a sidewalk where warm street lamps contrast with the cool air as futuristic vehicles stream past. As the camera moves along the coastal path, it momentarily turns toward a concrete barrier to reveal the dark ocean and twinkling distant city lights before returning to the asphalt shoulder. Finally, the view follows the curve of the highway, guided by the glow of passing headlights and taillights stretching into the distance.
